sglang.title: [MoE] Add Comprehensive MoE Integration Tests
sglang.author: jonahbernard
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR adds a comphrensive suite of MoE integration tests to add test coverage for MoE models from beginning to end. Currently, MoE code is only tested tangentially through the testing of other features (i.e., quantization).

sglang.title: [Deepseek V3.2] Only skip Indexer logits computation when is_extend_without_speculative
sglang.author: hlu1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixed a bug in #12788
Modifications
We should only skip Indexer logits computation when forward_mode.is_extend_without_speculative() returns true, meaning that no cuda graph is involved. The is_extend_without_speculative was only added to the MHA path, but not the MLA path. So when MLA is

sglang.title: optm(checkpoint-engine): disable multi-thread loading when update weights
sglang.author: BraveY
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
For GPU tensors, using multi-threaded loading of weights may incur higher overhead due to the GIL.
Before optimization, the checkpoint-engine took 50s to update kimi-k2's weights on 2 nodes, and after optimization, the update time dropped to 15s.
Motivation
This pull request optimizes the load_weigh

sglang.title: [router] Support structured model output for openai and grpc router
sglang.author: key4ng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add support for structured model output to the SGLang router for both OpenAI and gRPC routes. This enables the router to constrain model outputs to conform to specific JSON schemas, which is critical for building reliable LLM applications that need predictable, parseable responses.

Modif

sglang.title: Fix data parallel controller launch for num nodes > 2
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Fix a bug introduced by #5889 when the number of nodes > 2.  #5889 reused the server_args.dist_init_addr for both zmq broadcast and torch.dist initialization, which will conflict with each other at the same time. This PR fixed it by using a different port for zmq broadcast.
Other style fixes

sglang.author: rainj-me

When prefill attn backend set to FA4, the page size is hardcode to 128, which lead to the DS R1 FP4 model large scale EP deployment could not deploy with the following combination due to the trtllm-mla only support 16, 32, 64 page size.

sglang.title: [router][grpc] Refactor: Add builders for chat and responses
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The ResponsesResponse, ChatCompletionResponse, and ChatCompletionStreamResponse has been used across the repo with more than 50 references. It is more elegant and rust idoimatic to use builder pattern instead.

Modifications

Implemented builder patterns for response types
Added builder e

sglang.title: [router][grpc] Move all error logs to their call sites
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, error.rs logs error or warn logs for errors. It is hard to trace back the call's original call sites in this way.
Since rust doesn't support log_exception. This PR moves all the logs to error's call site. This way it is easier to tell where the error comes from.

Modifications

The MCP integration tests were using the external DeepWiki MCP server (https://mcp.deepwiki.com/mcp), which frequently hit rate limits during CI runs. This caused tests to be temporarily skipped, reducing test coverage for the MCP feature.

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Originally, Logprobs are stored as list[dict[int, Logprob]], which means for each requests with logprobs enabled, it would create a lot of objects collected by GC

1 list for each request
<sequence_length> dictionaries for each position
<sequence_length>*<top_logprob> Logprob objects to stor

vllm.title: [Log] update shm wait time msg
vllm.author: BoyuanFeng
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
One user asked about long compilation time, as the log suggested "This typically happens when some processes are hanging or doing some time-consuming work (e.g. compilation)".
But we found that most time are spent on weight/kv-cache quantization. This PR updates the log to provide more information.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix and add tests for GptOss reasoning parser
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
GPT-OSS can escape structured outputs by emitting tokens between <|channel|>final and <|message|>, for example: <|start|>assistant<|channel|>final <|constrain|>JSON<|message|>content....
This PR updates the parser to look for <|start|>assistant<|channel|>final and then the suffix <|message|>

vllm.title: [Perf][DeepSeek] Add sigmoid+bias fusion to fused_grouped_topk from TRTLLM
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
FIX #28086
Inspired from TRTLLM, we add the sigmoid, e_score_correction_bias, and 32bit output cast into the fused_grouped_topk CUDA kernel that we already use for DeepSeek-like models. Gives about a 4.5% speedup on a medium concurrency benchmark with nvfp4 deepseek on B200.
